title: (Bearish Signal) REPL, RSI Indicator left the overbought zone on December 01, 2020
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that REPL's price could be shifting from an uptrend to a downtrend. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked back and found 20 similar cases where REPL's RSI Indicator left the overbought zone, and in 18 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 90%.Current price $47.83 is above $44.34 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 10/30/20 - 12/02/20, the price experienced a +17% Uptrend. During the week of 11/24/20 - 12/02/20, the stock enjoyed a +0.99% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/i0clv44kf0361.png?width=1532&format=png&auto=webp&s=a5d83fb92ae3b48913649753da59dbe3f4a0a603

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for REPL moved out of overbought territory on December 02, 2020. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 20 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. In 17 of the 20 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 85%.

The Stochastic Indicator may be shifting from an upward trend to a downward trend. In 25 of 32 cases where REPL's Stochastic Oscillator exited the overbought zone, the price fell further within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 78%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram (MACD) for REPL turned negative on November 06, 2020. This could be a sign that the stock is set to turn lower in the coming weeks. Traders may want to sell the stock or buy put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 16 similar instances when the indicator turned negative. In 14 of the 16 cases the stock turned lower in the days that followed. This puts the odds of success at 88%.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where Apple declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 80%.

REPL broke above its upper Bollinger Band on November 04, 2020. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8111784-replimune-group-repl-52-65-rsi-indicator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-december-01-2020?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
